title: kyllinga erecta var. polyphylla
intro: Kyllinga erecta var. polyphylla, also known as Java flatsedge, is a type of grassy plant native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Kyllinga erecta var. polyphylla include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of various diseases. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses.
